h8b9718dbg227ag442ega6c1gf29c02511733: Shouldn't you be getting home? The grove ain't safe.
hd93a4fc9g17a7g4fa5ga2e7ge5fff2565577: Leave while folk still need my lotions and potions? I simply couldn't.
hc096758dgb004g489cgb5fdga764e8766e6c: Couldn't pass up the chance to make some coin, you mean.
hd0282f3fg839bg4f08g8c06gaf429c510d5f: Wait for Baldur's Gate, love. The coin you'll make shining shoes and scrubbing chamber pots - you won't know yourself.
h8f856908gc668g41cag9610g2fb0c07d4f9f: Showing up here out of the blue, you've got good timing.
h29ca193bg9d42g4a2fgac51g19d85a7e032d: I had to! Kicked out of your own homes, poor things. How could I stay away?
h50c8e615gabc9g4471g94f7gb1443009ee75: And how did you make it past all the goblins and gnolls?
he7f2bec9gda2cg47abg9c58g8f4fc888e39e: Well, when you've lived as long as I have, you pick up a few tricks, you know?
ha02438dag2029g4ff4g929egc8dd8182537a: Sure I can't tempt you with some spices? That stew is pungent.
h8b1692bdg4ea2g423ega8b6g4d51d5265aaa: The smell doesn't matter. It's food in their bellies.
hb73bc527g0f59g4350gaa02g0d9042fa35fc: Why, you can't call something food if it doesn't smell good - cooking is an art, petal.
hfa5e3d73g7652g4134ga2a1gaf010ee7779d: So long as my 'art' doesn't choke them on the way down, I call it a job done.
